text.title: PH Launch Day Runbook Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example of PH Launch Day Runbook producing a valid playbook-step artefact, anonymised for portability.

step.name: trigger
step.text: Engagement onboarded; the PH Launch Day Runbook methodology was selected after Applies-If was satisfied (named owner Ruslan Faion, downstream consumer engagement charter, source-of-truth in docs/).

step.name: apply-rules
step.text: Walked the rules from 01-core-rules.xml. First-pass review surfaced one violation (missing evidence anchor on a non-trivial field); patched and re-ran.

step.name: produce
step.text: Filled templates/launch-day-log.md per the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml; emitted artefact_id with date; signed off by the engagement owner.

step.name: validate
step.text: Ran scripts/validate-ph-launch-day-runbook.py --file <path>; validator returned 0; the _smoke-test.md fixture also passed.

text.example: Applies-If held; inputs reachable; rules walked; artefact filled; validator returned 0; owner signed off; downstream consumer registered.
